issues.title: Review read-only Sepolia balance checker

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Manual wallet input validates Ethereum addresses.
RPC unavailable does not display invented values and all data states are represented.
No wallet connection, transaction, sale, price, fee, or booking UI exists.

issues.missingWork: None for the recorded acceptance criteria.
issues.reason: Every acceptance criterion is covered by deterministic unit and browser evidence.
issues.suggestedComment: Verified on main 5b34682: eligibility unit tests and Playwright cover address validation, RPC states, read-only behavior, and prohibited CTAs. Recommend closing as completed.

issues.title: Review pilot campaign rules

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Snapshot or live-check window remains unpublished until approvals.
Legal, privacy, security, operations, and governance states remain explicit.
Request window, inventory, and report path remain blocked until approval.

issues.missingWork: No missing work for confirming the draft-not-live state; future approval is a separate gate.
issues.reason: The requested no-go review is machine-verified and all approvals remain blocked.
issues.dependency: Future live status remains dependent on external approvals, outside this issue's confirmation scope.
issues.suggestedComment: Verified on main: pilot:campaign passes and pilot:live reports 12 blocked, 2 evidence-only, 0 approved gates. Recommend closing this draft-state review as completed.

issues.title: Review Sepolia testnet allocation policy

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Per-wallet and campaign caps are documented.
Duplicate and invalid addresses are rejected.
Manual review and anti-spam rules are explicit and preparation never broadcasts.

issues.missingWork: None for policy review; actual allocation remains unapproved and out of scope.
issues.reason: Policy, generator guardrails, dry-run evidence, and aggregate report checks satisfy the issue.
issues.dependency: Any future execution requires separate approvals and Safe review.
issues.suggestedComment: Verified allocation caps, invalid/duplicate rejection, anti-spam and manual-review rules, aggregate reporting, and no-broadcast behavior. Recommend closing as completed.

issues.title: Finalize allocation report template

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Template contains campaign ID, totals, status, SHA-256, and no-private-data fields.
Request totals are separated from allocation outcomes.
Post-campaign report hash workflow is documented.

issues.missingWork: None for the template; no final campaign report exists because no campaign is live.
issues.reason: The template and checker cover every requested field and privacy boundary.
issues.dependency: A real report depends on a separately approved campaign.
issues.suggestedComment: Template structure, aggregate separation, privacy statement, and SHA-256 workflow are present and allocation:check passes. Recommend closing as completed.

issues.title: Expand frontend eligibility tests

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Invalid, zero, sufficient, wrong-chain, unavailable, stale, and forbidden-copy cases pass.
One-RPC-fails and one-succeeds fallback is covered.
No transaction or sale-oriented controls exist.

issues.missingWork: None for the listed deterministic cases.
issues.reason: All listed fixtures and browser regressions pass on current main.
issues.suggestedComment: Verified all requested deterministic eligibility and RPC fallback cases. Playwright passes with no transaction/sale controls. Recommend closing as completed.

issues.title: Keep mainnet gate blocked until approvals

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Gate fails for blocked, draft, unknown, missing, and review-required states.
Expected blocked behavior is documented and CI-verifiable.
Mainnet remains unapproved until external gates are complete.

issues.missingWork: 29 legal, audit, operator, governance, value, and production approvals remain unapproved.
issues.reason: The implementation is verified, but the issue remains the P0 externally blocked production-decision sentinel.
issues.dependency: Independent review, counsel, entity, operator, privacy, governance, tax/accounting, and production evidence.
issues.suggestedComment: The fail-closed gate is working and reports 29 unapproved states. Keep this issue open as an externally blocked production-decision sentinel; it is not ready for contributor implementation.

issues.title: Maintain value claim checker coverage

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Policy and prohibition contexts pass while unsupported claims fail with file and line output.
Docs, generated site, release drafts, and social copy are scanned.

issues.missingWork: None for current scan coverage; future surfaces must continue using the same gate.
issues.reason: Current scanner coverage and line-level reporting satisfy the issue and are exercised by CI.
issues.suggestedComment: value and claims pass; both scanners include docs, site, release and social surfaces with file/line diagnostics. Recommend closing as completed.

issues.title: Harden V2 audit package command

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Package contains V2 source, ABI, bytecode, tests, Slither baseline, known issues, freeze doc, and checksums.
Package rejects canonical-V2 or completed-audit claims.
Missing optional artifacts are documented.

issues.missingWork: No command-hardening work remains; initiating an independent review is tracked separately in #121.
issues.reason: A package was reproduced on current main with required files and SHA256SUMS; optional omissions were reported explicitly.
issues.dependency: Independent reviewer procurement is #121, not part of this implementation issue.
issues.suggestedComment: Reproduced audit:package on main 5b34682. Required V2 source, ABI, bytecode, tests, baseline, known issues, freeze docs and checksums are present; optional omissions are listed. Recommend closing.

issues.title: Improve accessibility for utility pilot pages

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Keyboard navigation covers the balance checker with Tab, Enter, and Space.
Visible focus, logical focus order, and no focus loss are verified.
Loading, success, unavailable, wrong-chain, and invalid states use accessible status and error semantics.
Mobile layout has no horizontal overflow.

issues.missingWork: None for the recorded acceptance criteria. Issue closure remains a manual maintainer action after merge.
issues.reason: Deterministic mocked-RPC browser tests now prove the keyboard-only and screen-reader-compatible journey on desktop and mobile.
issues.dependency: None; deterministic mocked RPC is already available.
issues.suggestedComment: Verified on desktop and mobile with mocked Sepolia RPC: Tab focus order, visible focus, Enter/Space activation, persistent button focus, live status announcements, linked validation errors, unavailable/wrong-chain states, and no horizontal overflow. Recommend closing after the implementation PR is merged.

issues.title: Review EN/ES/RU utility-pilot translations

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Review current EN/ES/RU site translations.
Translated states preserve cautious claims and plain-language clarity.

issues.missingWork: The current public UI is English-only. Maintainer must explicitly rescope this issue to future translation-source review or archive it after a documented product decision.
issues.reason: The original multi-language acceptance criteria no longer match current English-only product scope; existence of historical translations is not completion evidence.
issues.dependency: Maintainer translation-scope decision and reviewed English source copy.
issues.suggestedComment: Current main is English-only by documented decision, so the original EN/ES/RU acceptance criteria are superseded, not completed. Rescope before any closure recommendation.

issues.title: Prepare transparency update template for v0.2 RC

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Current, planned, conceptual, and not-claimable sections are separated.
Validation commands and expected blocked mainnet gate are recorded.
Report hash workflow does not broadcast transactions.

issues.missingWork: None for the template; publishing any future report remains a separate reviewed action.
issues.reason: The report template, review packet, source-linked monthly generator, and checksum checker satisfy all requested structure and safety criteria.
issues.suggestedComment: Verified section separation, command recording, expected blocked mainnet gate, source-linked monthly generation, and SHA-256/no-broadcast workflow. Recommend closing as completed; no automated closure was performed.

issues.title: Collect community preview feedback summary

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Received feedback is categorized by site, docs, utility, accessibility, and security.
Raised risks and next actions are documented from actual feedback.
Summary excludes private guest data and unsupported claims.

issues.missingWork: No external community-preview feedback was found. The existing report counts maintainer-created intake issues, not completed external feedback outcomes.
issues.reason: A workflow and zero-input baseline exist, but actual feedback is an external dependency and acceptance is not met.
issues.dependency: Public reviewer participation without private or sensitive submissions.
issues.suggestedComment: Keep open. The workflow is ready, but current evidence contains no external feedback to categorize; maintainer-created intake issues do not satisfy the acceptance criteria.

issues.title: Enforce generated sitemap and canonical route parity

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Every generated public HTML route has exactly one sitemap and matching canonical URL.
Missing and duplicate routes have deterministic failure fixtures.

issues.reason: Merged PR #129 completed the deterministic route, sitemap and canonical parity criteria.
issues.suggestedComment: Closed by merged PR #129. Retain the route inventory and negative fixtures in npm run site.

issues.title: Add deterministic operator sandbox lifecycle tests

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Baseline fake-data campaign, inventory, eligibility, decision, close, and aggregate flow is tested.
Duplicate-wallet, inventory-exhaustion, repeated-decision, and post-close transitions are tested.
Audit-log ordering and aggregate count consistency are asserted after rejected transitions.
Aggregate report excludes participant and guest data.

issues.reason: Merged PR #130 completed the edge-state, audit reconciliation and malformed-state criteria.
issues.suggestedComment: Closed by merged PR #130. Keep invariant and malformed-state commands in the operator gate.

issues.title: Select independent reviewer and initiate frozen V2 review

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Qualified independent reviewer is selected with conflict and methodology evidence.
Exact immutable package is handed off with retest and disclosure terms.

issues.missingWork: Select and contract a real qualified independent reviewer, approve budget, and record handoff evidence.
issues.reason: External validation cannot be completed by repository code or a contributor PR.
issues.dependency: Qualified reviewer, conflict review, procurement, budget, and disclosure agreement.
issues.suggestedComment: Externally blocked. Keep open until a real reviewer is selected and the exact immutable package is formally handed off. Do not label this ready-for-contributor.

issues.title: Add deterministic landmark and heading hierarchy checks

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Each public route has one main landmark and one visible level-one heading.
Heading order and named navigation/footer landmarks are checked on desktop and mobile.

issues.missingWork: Add deterministic landmark and heading hierarchy assertions across public routes.
issues.reason: This is a network-independent successor accessibility task suitable for a new contributor.
issues.dependency: None; local generated pages and Playwright are sufficient.
issues.suggestedComment: Ready for a contributor. Use deterministic local pages only and keep current claims/value boundaries unchanged.

issues.title: Add negative fixtures for reviewer outreach gates

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Placeholder, missing-evidence, consent, candidate, checksum, wording, and disclosure failures have deterministic fixtures.
The real outreach tracker remains empty and contains no invented reviewer.

issues.missingWork: Add fake-only negative fixtures without changing the real tracker.
issues.reason: The gate exists, but focused failure fixtures are a reproducible contributor task.
issues.suggestedComment: Ready for a contributor. Keep the real outreach tracker empty and use fake local fixtures only.

issues.title: Add browser regression coverage for the public roadmap

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: The roadmap page quarter summaries and evidence boundaries are covered in local browser tests.
Keyboard, landmark, heading and mobile overflow behavior is deterministic.

issues.missingWork: Add local desktop/mobile roadmap page regression assertions.
issues.reason: The generated page needs focused browser evidence and requires no private infrastructure.
issues.suggestedComment: Ready for a contributor. Use the local generated roadmap page and do not add external claims.
